title: Questions about hours and location
goal: Find out the office hours (including weekends) and the clinic's address/parking.
hypothesis: Are the stated hours/location accurate and internally consistent, or does the agent give vague or contradictory info it can't actually verify?
opening_line: Hi, quick question — what are your office hours, and are you open at all on weekends?
edge_behavior: Also ask for the address and whether there's parking, to check whether it answers confidently with details it may not actually have. Compare against ground-truth.md.
wrap_up_when: you have answers (or non-answers) about hours and location
